---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or workflow improvement
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Before filing:
  - Skim the Roadmap section in README.md and the open issues — your idea may already be tracked or
    explicitly out of scope.
  - "Things I will probably push back on" in CONTRIBUTING.md lists directions I have decided not to take.
-->

## Problem

What workflow / engagement situation is painful today? Describe the user (admin, engagement lead, pentester, reviewer, client) and what they're trying to do.

## Proposed solution

What should Vulnex do differently? Be concrete — UI changes, new endpoint, new model, new importer, new export format, etc.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve the same problem, and why this is the better one. ("None" is a valid answer if you genuinely can't think of any.)

## Scope check

- [ ] This fits a real penetration-testing workflow (not just a generic ticketing feature).
- [ ] This is not better solved by an existing tool you would integrate with (Jira, Defectdojo, etc.).
- [ ] This does not require a frontend framework, multi-tenant billing, or a major rewrite of the report engine / finding model / auth stack.

## Mockups / sketches

If the change is visual, attach a sketch, screenshot from another tool, or a description of the layout. Drag-drop images into the box.

## Anything else?

Related engagements, prior art in other tools (PlexTrac, Dradis, Faraday, BloodHound, …), or specific clients / users this would unblock.
